---
title: "Projects"
---

Projects are the build layer of Lunaland: reproducible workflows, statistical explainers and interactive tools.

## Featured projects

### [RNA-seq Workflow Demo](rnaseq-workflow.qmd)

A compact reproducible RNA-seq workflow showing how raw sequencing data moves through quality control, alignment, quantification and interpretation.

**Related concepts:** reproducibility, quality control, differential expression, workflow design  
**Related pitfalls:** mismatched annotation file, low counts and overinterpretation  
**Related Crosswalk posts:** interpreting uncertainty in genomic analysis

---

### Shiny Statistical Explainer

An interactive app explaining odds ratios, confidence intervals and sample size in genetic association studies.

**Related concepts:** uncertainty, confidence intervals, effect size, statistical significance  
**Related pitfalls:** low counts and overinterpretation  
**Related Crosswalk posts:** when is a result meaningful?
